nasb.text: All the people of Judah took Azariah, who was sixteen years old, and made him king in the place of his father Amaziah.

esv.text: And all the people of Judah took Azariah, who was sixteen years old, and made him king instead of his father Amaziah.

cnv.text: 猶大的眾民選立了亞撒利雅；他只有十六歲，他們就立他接續他父親亞瑪謝作王。

ccb.text: 犹大民众拥立亚玛谢十六岁的儿子亚撒利雅为王。
